name: WJX Ultimate Needle Cartridge – 0.30mm 1RL
shortDescription: Premium WJX Ultimate Round Liner needle cartridge with 0.30 mm needle thickness, 1RL configuration. 20 pcs sterile, individually packaged needle cartridges per box. Excellent for contour lines.
description:
The WJX Ultimate Round Liner needle cartridge represents the new generation of premium quality needles. Designed specifically for professional tattoo and permanent makeup artists.

The 0.30 mm needle thickness and 1RL configuration is ideal for fine contour lines, eyebrow strokes, and precise line work. The 0.30 mm is a medium thickness that offers a good balance between fineness and pigment transfer.

The advanced membrane technology reduces needle bounce-back and protects the machine. The transparent, ergonomic cartridge design provides better visibility during work.

1 box = 20 pcs sterile, individually packaged needle cartridges.

faq.question: What techniques is the 0.30mm 1RL needle cartridge ideal for?
faq.answer: The 0.30 mm needle thickness and 1RL configuration is ideal for fine eyebrow strokes, eyeliner, and precise contour lines. The 0.30 mm is a medium thickness that creates a good balance between fineness and strong pigment transfer.

faq.question: Is the needle cartridge sterile, and how many times can it be used?
faq.answer: Yes, every needle cartridge arrives in sterile, individually packaged form. Needle cartridges are single-use – for hygienic reasons, a new cartridge must be used for each treatment. 1 box contains 20 needle cartridges.

faq.question: Which machines is the WJX needle cartridge compatible with?
faq.answer: WJX needle cartridges are compatible with most standard cartridge tattoo machines. They work excellently with MAST (P60, Nano 2, Y22 Pro), Dragonhawk, and other universal cartridge system machines.
